response.original_title: 衝撃移籍第3弾ー。オイルと不貞に濡れる、本格寝取られシリーズに登場!! ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 小島みなみ
response.overview: "Is that your wife? That's great. You, stand in front of the camera." That day, I regretted letting my wife, Minami, watch the photoshoot. Minami had caught the eye of the renowned photographer, Mr. Oshima, and was even offered a nude photoshoot. "It's an honor..." she said, and proceeded with the nude shoot, but to her surprise, there was also a naked male model. Even though she protested that she hadn't been told about it in the meeting, Mr. Oshima wouldn't listen and continued to take nude photos of the man and woman. Then, Mr. Oshima, who hadn't missed the love juice dripping from Minami's crotch, came up with a plan.
response.title: The third shocking transfer! Appearing in a full-fledged cuckolding series, drenched in oil and infidelity!! Nude model NTR: Shocking footage of a wife's affair with her boss, drowning in shame. Minami Kojima
